inputs.label: Number of Devices
inputs.businessContext: Total count of devices with standby mode.

inputs.label: Standby Power per Device
inputs.businessContext: Power consumed per device in standby mode (watts).

inputs.label: Hours in Standby per Day
inputs.businessContext: Average hours per day the device is in standby (not active).

inputs.label: Days per Month
inputs.businessContext: Number of days in billing period (typically 30).

inputs.label: Electricity Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost per kilowatt-hour in local currency.

inputs.label: CO2 Emission Factor
inputs.businessContext: Carbon intensity of grid electricity (kg CO2 per kWh).
